LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER GENER BENITEZ'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND SEPARATE JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO RESPONDENT CHEN, FANLY AKA FANG CHEN KINANN

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Petitioner Gener Benitez telephone number 415-398-5329 in Propria Persona.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER GENER BENITEZ'S Petition To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
